attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT AE_HEADER_ID,
APPLICATION_ID,
LEDGER_ID,
ENTITY_ID,
EVENT_ID,
EVENT_TYPE_CODE,
ACCOUNTING_DATE,
GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE,
CAST(TO_DATE(GL_TRANSFER_DATE) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS GL_TRANSFER_DATE,
JE_CATEGORY_NAME,
ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_STATUS_CODE,
ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_TYPE_CODE,
AMB_CONTEXT_CODE,
PRODUCT_RULE_TYPE_CODE,
PRODUCT_RULE_CODE,
PRODUCT_RULE_VERSION,
DESCRIPTION,
COALESCE(DOC_SEQUENCE_ID,0) AS DOC_SEQUENCE_ID,
COALESCE(DOC_SEQUENCE_VALUE,0) AS DOC_SEQUENCE_VALUE,
COALESCE(ACCOUNTING_BATCH_ID,0) AS ACCOUNTING_BATCH_ID,
COALESCE(COMPLETION_ACCT_SEQ_VERSION_ID,0) AS COMPLETION_ACCT_SEQ_VERSION_ID,
COALESCE(CLOSE_ACCT_SEQ_VERSION_ID,0) AS CLOSE_ACCT_SEQ_VERSION_ID,
COALESCE(COMPLETION_ACCT_SEQ_VALUE,0) AS COMPLETION_ACCT_SEQ_VALUE,
COALESCE(CLOSE_ACCT_SEQ_VALUE,0) AS CLOSE_ACCT_SEQ_VALUE,
COALESCE(BUDGET_VERSION_ID,0) AS BUDGET_VERSION_ID,
FUNDS_STATUS_CODE,
COALESCE(ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID,0) AS ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID,
BALANCE_TYPE_CODE,
REFERENCE_DATE,
COMPLETED_DATE,
PERIOD_NAME,
COALESCE(PACKET_ID,0) AS PACKET_ID,
COALESCE(COMPLETION_ACCT_SEQ_ASSIGN_ID,0) AS COMPLETION_ACCT_SEQ_ASSIGN_ID,
COALESCE(CLOSE_ACCT_SEQ_ASSIGN_ID,0) AS CLOSE_ACCT_SEQ_ASSIGN_ID,
DOC_CATEGORY_CODE,
ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
ATTRIBUTE1,
ATTRIBUTE2,
ATTRIBUTE3,
ATTRIBUTE4,
ATTRIBUTE5,
ATTRIBUTE6,
ATTRIBUTE7,
ATTRIBUTE8,
ATTRIBUTE9,
ATTRIBUTE10,
ATTRIBUTE11,
ATTRIBUTE12,
ATTRIBUTE13,
ATTRIBUTE14,
ATTRIBUTE15,
COALESCE(GROUP_ID,0) AS GROUP_ID,
COALESCE(DOC_SEQUENCE_VERSION_ID,0) AS DOC_SEQUENCE_VERSION_ID,
COALESCE(DOC_SEQUENCE_ASSIGN_ID,0) AS DOC_SEQUENCE_ASSIGN_ID,
CREATION_DATE,
'-1' AS CREATED_BY,
CAST(COALESCE(CAST(LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)),CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS VARCHAR(19))) AS TIMESTAMP(0))
 AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
'-1' AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
'-1' AS LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
COALESCE(REQUEST_ID,0) AS REQUEST_ID,
COALESCE(UPG_BATCH_ID,0) AS UPG_BATCH_ID,
COALESCE(UPG_SOURCE_APPLICATION_ID,0) AS UPG_SOURCE_APPLICATION_ID,
UPG_VALID_FLAG,
ZERO_AMOUNT_FLAG,
COALESCE(PARENT_AE_HEADER_ID,0) AS PARENT_AE_HEADER_ID,
COALESCE(PARENT_AE_LINE_NUM,0) AS PARENT_AE_LINE_NUM,
ACCRUAL_REVERSAL_FLAG,
COALESCE(MERGE_EVENT_ID,0) AS MERGE_EVENT_ID,
NEED_BAL_CODE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
OFFSET_NUMBER,
PARTITION_NUMBER,
RECORD_COUNT
FROM
$$STGDB.PST_CLOUD_XLA_AE_HEADERS
